svg.text: Multus Delegate Fan-out: CNI ADD swimlane (kubelet → multus-shim → daemon → N delegates → Pod netns)
Pod has annotation k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks: [macvlan-conf, sriov-net]; default network = cilium; thick mode
D. delegate fan-out (chroot exec each plugin)
CNI spec: DEL must be idempotent.
Thin mode: shim builds clientset on
per Pod. Thick mode: 1 UDS round-trip,
all reads via informer cache. Trim
before cache write. Pod informer is
Daemon Pod has its own rootfs but
CNI spec returns ONE Result to
Source: multus-cni v4.2.4 pkg/multus/multus.go (CmdAdd, DelegateAdd, getIfname, delPlugins) + pkg/server/{server.go, exec_chroot.go} + pkg/k8sclient/k8sclient.go
